topics.title: Variables & Assignment
topics.description: Learn how to create variables and assign values in Python. Understand variable naming conventions and types.

topics.title: Data Types
topics.description: Explore Python's built-in data types: integers, floats, strings, booleans, and type conversion.

topics.title: Conditionals (if/elif/else)
topics.description: Master conditional statements to control program flow based on conditions.

topics.title: Loops (for/while)
topics.description: Learn to repeat code blocks with for and while loops. Understand loop control with break and continue.

topics.title: Functions & Parameters
topics.description: Write reusable code with functions. Learn about parameters, return values, and scope.

topics.title: Lists & Indexing
topics.description: Work with lists: creation, indexing, slicing, and common list methods like append, remove, sort.

topics.title: Dictionaries & Key-Value Pairs
topics.description: Organize data with dictionaries. Learn key-value pairs, dictionary methods, and iteration patterns.

topics.title: List Comprehensions
topics.description: Write concise and efficient list transformations using list comprehension syntax.

topics.title: Classes & Objects
topics.description: Create custom classes with attributes and methods. Understand instantiation and instance methods.

topics.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
topics.description: Build hierarchies with class inheritance. Use super() and override methods for polymorphic behavior.

topics.title: Exception Handling
topics.description: Handle errors gracefully with try/except/finally blocks. Create custom exceptions.

topics.title: File I/O & File Operations
topics.description: Read and write files in Python. Work with file modes, context managers, and common file operations.

topics.title: Modules & Imports
topics.description: Organize code with modules. Import built-in and custom modules to reuse code.

topics.title: Decorators & Meta-Programming
topics.description: Master function decorators and class decorators. Write meta-programming patterns that modify behavior.

topics.title: Generators & Iterators
topics.description: Write memory-efficient code with generators and yield. Understand lazy evaluation.
